creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladyslav V. Prodan from comment #4)

This is just an outline for future reference for documentation purposes in case someone else has a similar problem:

Thank you for your updates and you have already solved the problem yourself by moving/deleting the *.pkgsave files.
These files are most likely leftovers from previous installations.

But the real cause was the "Factory.pkgsave" (= last line of output below), on which the whole thing kept getting stuck:

> [...]
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo America/Nassau.pkgsave ...
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo Chile/EasterIsland ...
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo America/Regina.pkgsave ...
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo Africa/Kampala ...
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo America/Coral_Harbour.pkgsave ...
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo Africa/Lagos ...
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo America/Ojinaga ...
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo Europe/Berlin.pkgsave ...
> DEBUG: Reading zoneinfo Factory.pkgsave ...

The "Factory.pkgsave" is a copy of the "Factory" zoneinfo file and does not contain any real timezone info except a hint that a timezone must be set. You can also verify this via:

$ grep -Fr tzsetup /usr/share/zoneinfo/
Binary file /usr/share/zoneinfo/Factory matches
